allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=99480231a psql -h localhost -U postgres -d metaads -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' ORDER BY table_name;")

PowerShell($body = @{email='test@metaads.ai';password='admin123'} | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/login -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; $token = $login.data.token; $summary = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8080/api/v1/dashboard/summary -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "Daily spend entries:" $summary.data.daily_spend.Count; Write-Host "First entry:" \($summary.data.daily_spend[0] | ConvertTo-Json\); Write-Host "Has spend_delta:" \($summary.data.spend_delta -ne $null\); Write-Host "Has leads_delta:" \($summary.data.leads_delta -ne $null\))
Bash(psql -h localhost -U postgres -d metaads -c "SELECT MIN\(date\), MAX\(date\), COUNT\(*\) FROM campaign_insights;")

PowerShell($body = @{email='test@metaads.ai';password='admin123'} | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/login -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; $token = $login.data.token; Write-Host "=== Campaigns \(first, metrics\) ==="; $campaigns = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/v1/campaigns' -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "Campaign count:" $campaigns.data.Count; Write-Host "First campaign:" \($campaigns.data[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2\); Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== Check insights directly ==="; $insights = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/dashboard/campaigns/$\($campaigns.data[0].id\)/insights" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "Insights for first campaign:" \($insights | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 1\))
